category_sources: source_facts.description says wolfSSL is an embedded SSL library written in C; official manual describes the wolfSSL embedded SSL/TLS library.
display_name_sources: source_facts.homepage and official documentation use the display name wolfSSL.
docs_sources: Official wolfSSL documentation site hosts the wolfSSL manual with build, getting-started, features, portability, and API sections.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides the official repository, so repo is returned as null per instructions.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official wolfSSL manual describe an embedded C SSL/TLS library with cryptography and protocol support.
